name: Waifu Simulator: Latex Edition
short_description: Waifu Simulator is a simulation game whose ultimate goal is to bring you pleasure and relaxation!
detailed_description:
Waifu Simulator is a simulation game whose ultimate goal is to bring you pleasure and relaxation!

Choose one of the 12 girls and start the game! With a very entertaining puzzle game, you will combine gems and over time you will unlock beautiful art of your waifu. After completing a level you will have access to the high resolution art in the gallery, as well as access to another girl.

Game Features:

* 12 unique girls;

* Each girl has her own level of difficulty;

* An entertaining and relaxing puzzle game;

* Gallery, where you can see all previously unlocked girls;

* Anime Waifu;

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Simplified Chinese
